works.title: Modular and Transformable Denim Design for Multi-Size Adaptability
works.description: A component-based denim jacket and skirt integrating adjustable side-seam gussets that enable up to two numerical sizes of expansion. When closed, the garments maintain a fitted silhouette; when opened, the gussets increase circumference to accommodate a range of body sizes. A drawcord at the jacket waist provides additional fit regulation. Co-designed with P. Sidberry.

works.title: Fruit Loops — Hemp & Organic Cotton Interlocking Ring Garment
works.venue: Hemp Impressions · LSU Human Ecology Lobby, Louisiana's Old State Capitol, Corvallis Museum at Oregon State University
works.description: A top constructed from 46 snap-separating knit fabric rings in 55% hemp / 45% organic cotton. Hand-dyed adjustable jeans with a 2-inch knit insert for multi-size adaptability. National juried show: 14 of 20 entries selected (70% acceptance rate). Co-designed with D. Michaelson.

works.title: Weaving Sustainability through Zero-Waste Design: Reinventing Machine Jamdani Saree
works.venue: Creative Showcase 2025, Gogue Performing Arts Center, Auburn University, Auburn, AL
works.description: A zero-waste dress crafted by deconstructing a machine-made Jamdani saree from Dhaka, Bangladesh. The decorative border serves as the hemline, preserving the original artistry while achieving 100% fabric use in pattern-making.
